canonicalization.parser: UTF-8 strict JSON with duplicate object keys rejected
canonicalization.separators: comma and colon without surrounding whitespace
canonicalization.unicode: NFC strings emitted without ASCII escaping; surrogate code points rejected
canonicalization.numbers: integers only; floating-point literals NaN and infinities rejected
canonicalization.line_ending: canonical value bytes contain no trailing newline

digest_rules.bytes: canonical bytes of the payload object exactly
canonical bytes of the exact object declared by operator-program intermediate_construction
canonical bytes of the trace object with exactly the top-level content_sha256 member omitted
raw bytes of canonical run object followed by one LF byte
raw bytes of canonical evaluation object followed by one LF byte
canonical bytes of the resolved JSON value
canonical bytes of sorted relative-path/raw-file-sha256 entry array

payload.self_digest_rule: run and evaluation documents have no self digest; publication manifest carries their external raw-file digests
payload.serialization_rule: persisted JSON artifact equals canonical value bytes plus exactly one LF
payload.path_independence_rule: absolute paths timestamps git metadata Python version and working directory are never digest inputs
